message:
test(oracle): add 5 more conformance test suites (304 total)

New suites: where_text_vs_int_vdbe, order_by_affinity,
nested_subquery_correlated, insert_default_expr, limit_negative_zero.

All 304 conformance oracle tests pass with 0 mismatches.
